colors.name: warm-gray
colors.role: background — the desk the slate lies on; shifts to #e7dfcf in sepia mode

colors.name: graphite
colors.role: all primary text, the battery plate, the footer ground (12.1:1 on warm-gray)

colors.name: eink-white
colors.role: bento tiles, the device bezel, footer type; shifts to #f2ead9 in sepia mode

colors.name: amber
colors.role: the accent — decorative marks, ::selection, footer links/focus on graphite (5.8:1); only 2.4:1 on light ground, so it NEVER carries text there

colors.name: amber-deep
colors.role: derived functional amber for light ground: key spec figures, tile units, plus icons, focus ring (4.6:1 on warm-gray, 5.3:1 on e-ink white)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: secondary text — graphite at 72% alpha composited over paper (5.3:1 on warm-gray)

colors.name: shell
colors.role: device shell details: side buttons, USB-C port, the magnesium back plate

fonts.role: Latin display and body — the product speaking, calm and geometric
every Hangul glyph on the page, word-break: keep-all — Korean is first-class
spec readouts: bento figures, the spec table values, exploded-view callout labels

texture: No overlay texture — the paper feel comes from the warm gray field, hairline rules at 14% and 30% graphite, 18px tile radii, and one soft radial shadow under the SVG device. The only 'grain' is fictional: the hero copy claims the glass is micro-etched, and the page believes it by never adding gloss, gradient, or blur anywhere.

motion.name: flip-morph
motion.value: 420ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) — bento tile First-Last-Invert-Play, outer translate+scale with counter-scaled inner

motion.name: plus-to-minus
motion.value: 200ms same ease — the vertical bar of the tile's plus icon scaleY(1→0)

motion.name: detail-fade
motion.value: 300ms same ease, 140ms delay — expanded tile detail translateY(6px)+opacity, after the morph has committed

motion.name: explode-scrub
motion.value: smoothstep of scroll progress p∈[0.08, 0.70]; layer travel ±132px (glass/back) and ±44px (panel/battery) — the 3:1 ratio is the parallax

motion.name: callout-draw
motion.value: stroke-dashoffset 1→0 (pathLength=1), layer i draws over p∈[0.5+0.09i, 0.72+0.09i]; labels fade in at 1.4× the same window

motion.name: eink-flash
motion.value: 120ms linear, hard-cut keyframes filter invert(0→1→0) on the root — e-paper snaps, it does not fade; skipped under reduced motion

motion.name: pointer-parallax
motion.value: lerp k=0.09 per 60fps-normalized frame; device ±7px with the pointer, shadow ∓4px against it; fine pointers only, loop parks when settled

motion.name: device-float
motion.value: 6.5s ease-in-out infinite, translateY 0→-6px→0 — the only ambient motion on the page
